seo.defaultDescription: Interior Gate helps you connect with customers via chat, anytime, anywhere—designed for modern teams and multi-channel support.

home.title: Interior Gate | Chat with customers, anytime, anywhere
home.description: Interior Gate: chat and customer-communication support for your business. Streamline support with AI features and a consistent experience across channels.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Interior Gate
privacy.description: How Interior Gate handles personal data: purposes, third parties, international transfers, and your rights under Japanese law (APPI) where applicable.

featureOne.title: Meet your customers with an AI support agent
featureOne.descriptionOne: Deliver faster replies with a smart assistant that helps your team answer questions in real time.
featureOne.descriptionTwo: Use visual conversation history and context-aware suggestions to keep every customer interaction smooth.

featureTwo.title: Keep conversations active across every channel
featureTwo.description: Space-based chat view helps your team follow message threads, prioritize urgent requests, and respond consistently.

featureThree.title: Turn every inbox message into a sales opportunity
featureThree.description: Mail automation centralizes orders, support requests, and customer follow-ups so your team never misses an important update.

testimonial.title: Our blessed client said about us

one.heading: Incredible Experience
one.content: We had an incredible experience working with the team and were impressed by how quickly they understood our needs and improved our product.
one.author: Jane Cooper

two.heading: Excellent Support
two.content: Their support and execution quality helped us launch faster with more confidence. The process was smooth from start to finish.
two.author: Wade Warren
